news.summary: Santa Clara, California-based medical device company SI-BONE, Inc. (Nasdaq: SIBN) will be attending the 2025 Truist Securities MedTech Conference in Boston, MA. The event is scheduled for Tuesday, June 17, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. PT/1:00 p.m. ET, where company management will engage in a fireside chat. SI-BONE focuses on addressing sacropelvic disorders.
news.headline: SI-BONE will participate in Truist Securities MedTech Conference on June 17, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. PT/1:00 p.m. ET in Boston.

news.summary: In Toronto on June 4, 2025, Rogers Communications revealed that it has secured all necessary league approvals to acquire Bell's 37.5% share in Maple Leaf Sports & Entertainment (MLSE). This move solidifies Rogers' ownership in the prestigious sports and entertainment entity. Tony Staffieri, the President and CEO of Rogers, expressed satisfaction with the approval, emphasizing the significance of live sports and entertainment in the company's core business strategy. Rogers Communications is identified on the Toronto Stock Exchange as RCI.A and RCI.B, and on the New York Stock Exchange as RCI.
news.headline: Rogers completes acquisition of Bell’s 37.5% stake in MLSE, expanding ownership. CEO calls MLSE prestigious asset.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on June 4, 2025, the Canoe EIT Income Fund (TSX - EIT.UN) disclosed its monthly distribution for June 2025, amounting to $0.10 per unit. Those recorded as unitholders on June 20, 2025, are set to collect the distributions on July 15, 2025.
news.headline: Canoe EIT Income Fund declares $0.10 per unit monthly distribution for June 2025. Record date: June 20, payout: July 15, 2025.

news.summary: ChargePoint Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CHPT) announced its Q1 earnings after the market closed on Wednesday. The report revealed a loss of six cents per share, aligning with analyst forecasts. Quarterly revenue totaled $97.64 million, falling short of the expected $100.53 million and showing a decline from the $107.04 million revenue recorded in the same quarter last year. Additionally, Networked charging systems revenue... Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: ChargePoint stock falls after Q1: Revenue $97.64M (est. $100.53M), down from $107.04M last year; Q2 guidance weak.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a top derivatives and securities exchange network, announced its May trading volume stats worldwide. The report, titled "Cboe Global Markets Monthly Volume & Statistics," provides an overview of the company's performance during the month. Cboe highlighted key figures, showcasing its position as a market leader.
news.headline: Cboe Global Markets reports trading volume stats for May 2025. Leading exchange network.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Lowe's Companies, Inc. (NYSE: LOW) shared news of an upcoming virtual fireside chat to be hosted by Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. The event will feature Marvin R. Ellison, the company's chairman and CEO, along with Brandon J. Sink, the chief financial officer. This initiative aims to provide insights into Lowe's strategies and financial outlook. Such engagements play a crucial role in maintaining investor confidence and market transparency. This event underscores Lowe's commitment to effective communication with stakeholders and the investment community.
news.headline: Lowe's CEO and CFO to join virtual fireside chat by Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. June 4, 2025. Marvin R. Ellison and Brandon J. Sink to participate.

news.summary: In Marlborough, Massachusetts, on June 4, 2025, DALBAR unveiled its latest edition of the Quantitative Analysis of Investor Behavior – Variable Annuities (QAIB-VA) report. This annual report delves into the impact of investor behavior on returns in variable annuities in 2024.
news.headline: DALBAR reports continued outperformance by Variable Annuity investors in 2024 in its QAIB-VA report.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, Rivian Automotive, Inc. revealed that they priced a private offering of $1.25 billion aggregate principal amount of 10.000% senior secured green notes due 2031. The offering includes Rivian Holdings, LLC, Rivian, LLC, and Rivian Automotive, LLC as Co-Issuers. The company plans to utilize the net proceeds from this notes offering for certain purposes.
news.headline: Rivian Automotive offers $1.25 billion in senior secured green notes to refinance outstanding notes due 2026.
RIVIAN AUTOMOTIVE, INC. PRICES $1.25 BILLION SENIOR SECURED GREEN NOTES OFFERING TO REFINANCE OUTSTANDING SENIOR SECURED NOTES DUE 2026

news.summary: Metacon, under its subsidiary Metacon SA in Patras, Greece, has secured a project to conduct a technical feasibility assessment for a prominent chemical manufacturing company in the United States. The contract is valued at EUR 210,000. This recent development was announced in Stockholm on June 4, 2025. The study aims to...
news.headline: Metacon receives EUR 210,000 order for HIWAR® tech from US chemical leader for feasibility study.

news.summary: Chicago-based Monroe Capital Corporation (NASDAQ: MRCC) announced a dividend distribution of $0.25 per share for the second quarter of 2025. The distribution will be payable on June 30, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 16, 2025. The Company implemented a dividend reinvestment plan in October 2012, where distributions are reinvested unless a shareholder chooses to receive cash before the record date. Shareholders not opting out of the plan will see their distribution reinvested in additional company stock. Tax details of the distribution will be provided to shareholders via Form 1099 post end of the year and in the Company’s SEC filing.
news.headline: Monroe Capital Corp declared a $0.25/share dividend for Q2 2025, payable on June 30 to stockholders of record by June 16.
Joseph S. Clabby named new Chairman of BBSI's Board of Directors.

news.summary: Five Below Inc (NASDAQ: FIVE) released first-quarter financial results after the market closed. In Q1, the company generated revenue of $970.5 million, exceeding estimates of $966.49 million. Adjusted EPS stood at 86 cents, higher than the anticipated 82 cents. Total revenue witnessed a 19.5% YoY increase, with comparable sales rising by 7.1% YoY. The company achieved an operating income of $50.8 million in the quarter. Five Below expanded by opening 55 new stores, totaling 1,826 locations by the quarter's end. The quarter concluded with $427.46 million in cash and cash equivalents. The performance reflects the success of the company's strategy, focusing on trendy products, great value, and an enjoyable shopping experience.
news.headline: Five Below Inc reported Q1 revenue of $970.5 million, beating estimates of $966.49 million. Q1 Adjusted EPS was 86 cents, higher than estimated 82 cents. Company saw 19.5% revenue growth and opened 55 new stores, totaling 1,826 locations. CFO will step down.

news.summary: A report by Instrument Business Outlook (IBO), a top newsletter for the analytical and life science instrument industry and a subsidiary of Science & Medicine Group, discloses changes in CEO compensation for 2024. The review highlights significant trends in executive pay within the industry.
news.headline: IBO's 2024 Executive Compensation Review for Scientific Instrumentation shows changes in CEO salaries.

news.summary: Trane Technologies, a global climate innovator listed on NYSE (TT), has recently been acknowledged for its community efforts in the United States. The company was included in The Civic 50, a renowned list curated by Points of Light, honoring corporations deeply involved in social impact and community engagement. This recognition underscores Trane Technologies' commitment to corporate citizenship, with the company aligning its business operations with community well-being for over a decade. This achievement reflects the dedication of Trane Technologies to making a positive difference in society.
news.headline: Trane Technologies recognized on The Civic 50 list for outstanding corporate citizenship. (Numbers: NYSE:TT, USA, 10+ years, Points of Light)

news.summary: Annaly Capital Management, Inc., based in New York, recently declared a common stock dividend of $0.70 per share for the second quarter of 2025. This announcement signifies a recurring financial benefit for shareholders as the company continues to perform well.
news.headline: Annaly Capital Management, Inc. declares $0.70 per share dividend for 2nd Quarter 2025.

news.summary: PVH Corp, a publicly traded company (NYSE: PVH), announced its first quarter results for 2025. The Chief Executive Officer, Stefan Larsson, stated that they experienced revenue growth compared to the previous year and exceeded their projected guidance. Calvin Klein had a successful product launch with the Icon Cotton Stretch line, supported by the popular Bad Bunny campaign. The brand continues to attract global consumer interest. Additionally, TOMMY HILFIGER also contributed to the positive results.
news.headline: PVH Corp. exceeds Q1 revenue expectations, CEO highlights Calvin Klein success.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Cibus, Inc. (Nasdaq: CBUS), a prominent agricultural biotechnology company specializing in gene editing technologies for seed development, announced plans to offer shares of its Class A common stock in a public offering. The company will be selling all the securities in the offering. The Chairman of Cibus’ board, Mr. Rory Riggs, has shown interest in purchasing up to $10.0 million worth of shares in this offering, although this interest is not a binding agreement. The completion and size of the offering are subject to market conditions, with no guarantee of finalization.
news.headline: Cibus, Inc. plans public offering, with Chairman Rory Riggs expressing interest in purchasing up to $10 million in shares.

news.summary: A travel booking firm listed on the Nasdaq, Webus, has submitted a Form 6-K to update American investors and regulators regarding its intention to establish a $300 million XRP treasury.
news.headline: Chinese business allocates $300 million in XRP for moon mission, informs investors and regulators via Form 6-K.

news.summary: In Steinausen, Switzerland on June 4, 2025, Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) shared the news of the exercise of a two-well option for the Transocean Spitsbergen in Norway. This program is set to start in the first quarter of 2026, seamlessly following the rig's ongoing operations. The exercise of this option is projected to add roughly $100 million to the backlog of Transocean, with this amount being exclusive of any supplementary services.
news.headline: Transocean's $100M option exercised for Transocean Spitsbergen in Norway, adding backlog for 2026.

news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that unemployment rates have significantly dropped to 4.5%, showcasing a positive trend in job creation and economic growth. Additionally, the stock market has shown a remarkable increase, with the S&P 500 reaching a record high of 4,500 points. This comes as welcome news for investors and businesses alike. Experts suggest that these numbers reflect a recovering economy and offer hope for continued progress in the coming months. Overall, these developments point towards a promising outlook for the financial landscape.
news.headline: FireFly Metals Ltd secures C$25.8 million Canadian financing deal and C$41.2 million Australian equity raise.

news.summary: A virtual Annual Meeting of Shareholders for Universal Display Corporation is scheduled to take place on June 18, 2025, starting at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. The meeting will be conducted online and accessible to shareholders.
news.headline: Universal Display Corp holding virtual 2025 shareholders' meeting on June 18, 10:00 AM ET.

news.summary: In Reading, Pennsylvania, EnerSys, a prominent company specializing in stored energy solutions for industrial purposes, revealed that its Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Andrea Funk, will be speaking on June 11th at the 2025 Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conference in Chicago, Illinois. The fireside chat is set to start at 2:15 pm CT. Interested individuals can access a live audio webcast and listen to the archived replay through a provided link. This event marks an important opportunity for EnerSys to showcase its expertise and strategic insights.
news.headline: EnerSys to participate in Wells Fargo Conference on June 11, 2025. CFO to present at 2:15 pm CT. Event held in Chicago.

news.summary: Xcel Brands, Inc. reported a net loss of $2.8 million in the first quarter of 2025, an improvement of 56% from a net loss of $6.3 million in the same period a year ago. The non-GAAP net loss for Q1 2025 was $1.4 million, showing a 24% improvement from the first quarter of 2024. Adjusted EBITDA for Q1 2025 was negative $0.7 million, a 56% improvement from the prior year. Total revenue for Q1 2025 was $1.3 million, a 39% decrease from Q1 2024. The company's balance sheet at the end of Q1 2025 showed stockholders' equity of approximately $25.7 million, unrestricted cash and cash equivalents of $0.3 million, and long-term debt of $8.5 million. Xcel Brands is a media and consumer products company with a focus on livestream shopping and social commerce, aiming to reach 100 million followers across its brands. The company has seen growth in its social media following from 5 million to 45 million followers in the past five months. Xcel Brands holds brands like Halston, Judith Ripka, and C. Wonder, with plans to revolutionize shopping through various channels. Adjusted EBITDA is used by management as a measure of operating performance with non-GAAP net income and non-GAAP diluted EPS as supplemental information for investors.
news.headline: Xcel Brands Q1 2025: Net loss of $2.8M (-56% YoY), revenue $1.3M (-39% YoY). Operating expenses down $1.7M. EBITDA improved 56%. NY, Jun 4, 2025.

news.summary: A recent collaboration promises to elevate performance on the pickleball court by incorporating advanced health protocols and data-driven health strategies into the sport, which is currently experiencing significant growth in the United States. The partnership was announced in Delray Beach, Florida on June 4, 2025. Known as DUPR (Dynamic Universal Pickleball), this initiative aims to enhance the player experience and optimize health outcomes within the sport.
news.headline: Vita Bella partners with DUPR as official health partner for competitive pickleball, offering premium health plans.

news.summary: Tilly's, Inc., reported its financial performance for the first quarter of fiscal 2025, ending on May 3, 2025. The company, trading under NYSE as TLYS, noted a decline in comparable net sales compared to the same period last year. However, there was an improvement in sales trend compared to the previous quarter. CEO Hezy Shake highlighted that as they entered fiscal May, the start of the second quarter, there was a further improvement in the sales trend relative to the first quarter.
news.headline: Tilly's, Inc. announces fiscal 2025 first quarter results; comparable net sales decrease compared to last year, but showing sequential improvement.

news.summary: UiPath, a leading provider of agentic automation solutions listed on the NYSE under PATH, will hold a live webinar on June 18, 2025. The event, scheduled from 11:00 am to 12:00 pm Eastern Time, will showcase UiPath's capabilities in agentic automation. The webinar will include a fireside chat, product demo, and a Q&A session discussing the company's recent advancements in this field. The event will be headlined by Daniel Dines and Graham, offering insights into UiPath's latest innovations.
news.headline: UiPath (NYSE: PATH) to host live webinar on agentic automation on June 18, 2025, featuring fireside chat and product demo.

news.summary: According to reports, Reddit has filed a lawsuit against Anthropic, an AI startup backed by Amazon, alleging that the startup utilized Reddit's data without a proper licensing agreement. This news marks a dispute between the two entities. The lawsuit highlights the claim that Anthropic accessed and utilized Reddit's data without obtaining permission, leading to a legal battle. Reddit's legal action showcases their accusation against the AI startup for allegedly using their data unlawfully. The legal case sheds light on the issue concerning unauthorized data usage and ownership rights, bringing attention to the growing concerns surrounding data privacy and intellectual property rights in the tech industry.
news.headline: Reddit sues Anthropic for using data without permission. Amazon-backed AI startup reportedly did not have licensing agreement.
US vetoes UN Security Council draft resolution demanding ceasefire in Gaza
Matador Technologies Inc. completes second phase of private placement to aid in acquiring Bitcoins.

news.summary: Tel Aviv, Israel - June 04, 2025 - Viewbix Inc. (OTC: VBIX), a leading developer of ad-tech innovations, shared that its common stock has been given the nod for listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The Company anticipates that trading of its common stock will commence on Nasdaq under the symbol "VBIX" from around June 5, 2025. This move is subject to ongoing adherence to the exchange regulations.
news.headline: Viewbix (VBIX) moves to Nasdaq from OTC, trading as "VBIX" starting June 5, 2025, subject to compliance.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) disclosed their plans to engage in a fireside chat at the Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference on June 10, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. ET. This event marks a significant opportunity for Royalty Pharma plc to connect with industry peers and stakeholders to discuss their strategies and future outlook. It is anticipated to be a pivotal discussion at this reputable conference known for attracting key players in the healthcare sector.
news.headline: Royalty Pharma (Nasdaq: RPRX) to participate in Goldman Sachs Global Healthcare Conference on June 10, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. ET.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States dropped to 4.2% in the month of October, showing an increase in job opportunities as compared to the previous month. The economy added 531,000 new jobs during this period, primarily in the sectors of hospitality, healthcare, and professional services. The decrease in unemployment and the significant job growth indicate a positive trend in the country's labor market, reflecting ongoing efforts to recover from the impact of the pandemic. Additionally, it was noted that the average hourly earnings rose by 0.4% in October, suggesting potential wage growth for workers in the near future. This data highlights a promising outlook for both job seekers and the overall economy in the coming months.
news.headline: Washington regulators approve new rates for Washington Water Service’s Stroh’s Water System, ensuring safety and reliability.

news.summary: In Great Neck, New York, on June 4, 2025, BRT Apartments Corp. (NYSE: BRT) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share. This dividend will be distributed on July 9, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as of the closing of business on June 25, 2025.
news.headline: BRT Apartments Corp. (NYSE: BRT) declares $0.25 quarterly dividend per share, payable July 9, record date June 25.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, in Monroe Township, New Jersey, Ocean Power Technologies, Inc. appointed Jason Weed as the Senior Vice President - Commercial Sales. OPT, listed on NYSE American as OPTT, specializes in providing low-carbon, AI-driven maritime services to enhance ocean operations' safety and productivity. The company focuses on delivering power, data, and service solutions. Jason Weed's role is crucial in driving commercial sales for the company as it expands its operations.
news.headline: Ocean Power Technologies hires Jason Weed as Senior Vice President – Commercial Sales. Company specializes in low-carbon maritime services.

news.summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation, based in Issaquah, Washington, announced a report today stating their net sales for the retail month of May, ending on June 1, 2025, amounted to $20.97 billion. This reflects a 6.8 percent rise from the previous year's figure of $19.64 billion. The company's stock, traded under the symbol COST on Nasdaq, indicated this notable increase in revenue for the specified period.
news.headline: Costco reports $20.97 billion in net sales for May 2025, up by 6.8% from the previous year.

news.summary: Global Ship Lease, Inc., a containership charter owner, based in Athens, Greece, announced a cash dividend of $0.546875 per depositary share (representing a 1/100th interest in a share of its 8.75% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares - NYSE: GSLPrB). The dividend is payment for the period from April 1, 2025, to June 30, 2025. It will be disbursed on July 1, 2025, to all Series B Preferred Shareholders recorded as of June 23, 2025.
news.headline: Global Ship Lease declared a dividend of $0.546875 per depositary share for its 8.75% Series B Preferred Shares, payable on July 1, 2025.

news.summary: Today, in New York, Xcel Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: XELB) disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. Xcel, a proficient media and consumer products corporation renowned for their proficiency in livestream shopping and social commerce, unveiled the latest updates.
news.headline: Xcel Brands, Inc. reports improved operating results in Q1 2025 due to "Project Fundamentals" program. Company specializes in livestream shopping and social commerce.

news.headline: Heritage Insurance Holdings to participate at Sidoti Small-Cap Virtual Conference on June 4, 2025. CEO and CFO to present.

news.summary: Today in DOWNERS GROVE, Illinois, Markem-Imaje, a division of Dover (traded as DOV on NYSE), unveiled MB2253, a novel black MEK ink tailored for industrial marking and coding systems. This global provider of end-to-end supply chain solutions is set to revolutionize the industry with its latest product launch.
news.headline: Markem-Imaje introduces MB2253 black MEK ink for beverage industry marking and coding. Dover (NYSE: DOV) subsidiary.
